description: Round toed, charcoal black shoes Synthetic leather upper, strategically placed overlays for durability Padded tongue with branding and central lace ups Padded mouth and reinforced heel collar with branding Soft footbed with branding at the heel Foxing along the sides Durable, textured outsole with wavy grooves for absolute grip and durability Warranty: 3 months from the date of purchase, against manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
